arts.ttl: Report: Brighton turn down huge Saudi Pro League offer for attacker – but another bid lined up
arts.sum: Brighton have turned down a major bid from Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr for Kaoru Mitoma, making it clear they have no intention of selling their star winger. The offer, believed to be around €65m (£54.42m), was swiftly rejected, reports BBC Sport. arts.ttl: Al-Nassr bid €65m for Brighton star Kaoru Mitoma
arts.sum: The Athletic's football correspondent David Ornstein has exclusively revealed on X that Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr, the team that Cristiano Ronaldo plays for, have attempted to raid Brighton. Saudi Pro League side Al-Nassr have launched a shock transfer bid for Brighton and Hove Albion's wing wizard.
